title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Sonata Software Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Sonata Software Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sonata Software Ventures Solutions:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software Ventures Solutions!
